<!--
  Edit this file before tagging a release.
  Bullet points here appear in the GitHub Release body above the Full Changelog link.
  One line per feature or fix. Keep entries short and user-facing.
-->

- Added `mob profile <type> [<ticks>]` command — measures avg MSPT contribution and avg entity count per tick for a specific entity type over a configurable window (default 100 ticks); per-dimension breakdown shown when entities span multiple worlds. Profiling technique adapted from [fabric-carpet](https://github.com/gnembon/fabric-carpet).
